languages.text: "Ты изъясняешься так же странно, как и твоя сестра".

languages.text: «Hablas de un modo extraño, igual que tu hermana».

languages.text: “你说话的方式很怪，和你姐姐一样。”
languages.original_text: "Your way of speaking is strange, just like your sister's."

languages.text: « Vous avez une étrange façon de parler, comme votre sœur. »
languages.original_text: "Your way of speaking is strange, just like your sister's."

languages.text: 「お前の話し方は、姉妹と同じくおかしなものだ」
languages.original_text: "Your way of speaking is strange, just like your sister's."

traits.locale_text: 「お前の話し方は、姉妹と同じくおかしなものだ」

languages.text: "Ihr redet seltsam, genau wie Eure Schwester."
languages.original_text: "Your way of speaking is strange, just like your sister's."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr redet seltsam, genau wie Eure Schwester."

languages.text: "Konuşma şeklin çok garip. Tıpkı kız kardeşin gibi konuşuyorsun."
